faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Eltingville?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Eltingville typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the size of your home, the severity of the infestation, and the treatment method used. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Eltingville homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Eltingville take 4-8 hours for heat treatment or require 2-3 visits for chemical applications spaced 10-14 days apart. We'll provide a detailed timeline during your free inspection and work around your schedule to minimize disruption.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Eltingville home during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatments, you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours while we raise temperatures to eliminate bed bugs at all life stages. Chemical treatments typically require 4-6 hours away from treated areas. We provide detailed preparation instructions and can accommodate same-day or evening appointments for your convenience.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for children and pets in Eltingville?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for families and pets when applied correctly. Heat treatment is 100% chemical-free, while our targeted chemical applications use low-toxicity products. All treatments are performed by licensed technicians, and we provide clear re-entry instructions to ensure your family's safety.
